case_title: IKEDA, GEORGE et al vs. BEASLEY, TANYA et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IKEDA, GEORGE IKEDA, MIYAKO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMAS, ALBERT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1906 MISSION ST #204, LEASE FORFEITED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF IKEDA, GEORGE IKEDA, MIYAKO SERVED AUG-15-1995, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS, ALBERT
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF IKEDA, GEORGE IKEDA, MIYAKO
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT BEASLEY, TANYA
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS, ALBERT

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS, ALBERT
